channel.title: Prep Plate Weekly
channel.description: Fresh takes for busy professionals who meal prep.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in macros with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest macros adjustments that busy professionals who meal prep report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: freezer friendly lunches
item.description: The persistent myths around freezer friendly lunches, stress-tested against what busy professionals who meal prep actually report.

item.title: The state of Recipes in 2026
item.description: A field report on recipes: where things stand, and what busy professionals who meal prep should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Freezer without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to freezer for busy professionals who meal prep — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "high protein meal prep" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "high protein meal prep" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why busy professionals who meal prep are rethinking Macros
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how busy professionals who meal prep approach macros — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Tools on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in tools — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Freezer: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping freezer for busy professionals who meal prep.
